name: Cock-Cleaning Duty
description:
[MALE POV]

Breeding farm - a place unlike any other. Both male and female criminals get sent here to receive their punishment. Females get fucked and bred by large, strong horse men every day without a minute of rest, while males used to clear horses' cocks after a long day of breeding the female prisoners by giving them a good deepthroat.

You are one of the prisoners sent to the Breeding farm and from now on you will spend the rest of your prison sentence here, sucking huge, meaty horse cocks.

This bot may have a lot of issues, sometimes talks for you, etc. I tried everything I could to make it work properly, so sorry if something is still going to go wrong. I tried to use example dialogs for the first, but they didn't make any difference, so I just deleted them to not waste the tokens.

This bot is not as detailed as I think it should be, but I guess its good enough.

I know I said that I won't make any scenario bots in the near future, but today I wanted to suck a cock so much that I decided to channel all that desire into the bot.
